The plunkle crystal is on the floor. The cauldron is on the floor. The borpulus is on the floor. The plate is on the floor. The liquid is in the cauldron. There are passages to a pantry and a conservatory here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
> put plonkle crystal into cauldron

You put the plonkle crystal into the cauldron.
The plonkle crystal mingles with the liquid in the cauldron with a phase shift.
> put peach into cauldron

You put the peach into the cauldron.
The peach combines with the liquid in the cauldron with a gloopy sound.
> swirl fire wand at cauldron

You wave the fire wand at the cauldron.
The liquid in the hot cauldron swirls with a puff of vapor.
> take plunkle crystal
You take the plunkle crystal. In your inventory you have a plunkle crystal and a fire wand.
> put plunkle crystal into cauldron

You put the plunkle crystal into the cauldron.
The plunkle crystal mingles with the liquid with a pop creating the finished potion in the cauldron.
